bondInfo.name: Yan
bondInfo.desc: [Yan] Operators' ATK increases by (23 + 0.9 × stacks)% <With 6 different [Yan] Operators on field> At the start of battle, 'Yan's Protection' is summoned with ATK and HP equal to 30% of the total ATK and HP of all [Yan] Operators at that moment. 'Yan's Protection' can use 'Cleansing Flame': attacks inflict a percentage of damage as Burn, and inflicts Elemental Fragility on surrounding enemies

bondInfo.name: Sargon
bondInfo.desc: When any [Sargon] Operator activates a skill, all [Sargon] Operators temporarily gain +12 ASPD (up to a +300) for (5 + 0.22 × stacks) seconds <With 6 different [Sargon] Operators on field> Skill activations will also cause all [Sargon] Operators to temporarily gain increased ATK (up to +300%) for the same duration

bondInfo.name: Victoria
bondInfo.desc: [Victoria] Operators carrying equipment deal (120 + 0.8 × stacks)% damage <Every 25 stacks> Obtain 1 random Victorian Hammer <With 6 different [Victoria] Operators on field> All [Victoria] Operators carrying equipment gain +80% ATK

bondInfo.name: Kjerag
bondInfo.desc: [Kjerag] Operators deal 130% damage, and deal (135 + 1 × stacks)% to Cold and Frozen enemies <With 6 different [Kjerag] Operators on field> A chill gust blows on the battlefield every 25 seconds, inflicting Cold on enemies for (20 × 0.1 × stacks) seconds

bondInfo.name: Laterano
bondInfo.desc: [Laterano] Operators gain (5 + 1.5 × stacks)% ammo on skill activation (rounded down) <With 6 different [Laterano] Operators on field> All [Laterano] Operators gain +4% ATK when any [Laterano] Operator spends 1 bullet, up to +180%

bondInfo.name: Ægir
bondInfo.desc: [Ægir] Operators' +(35 + 1 × stacks)% HP When the battle begins, [Ægir] Operators will devour the Operator on the tile in front of them, dealing 6000 Physical damage to the Operator and gaining their base ATK and Block, while adding [Ægir] stacks equal to the devoured Operator's Tier <With 5 different [Ægir] Operators on the field> The first 2 defeated will immediately revive

bondInfo.name: Investor
bondInfo.desc: Operators' 'When obtained' Attributes trigger twice <At 70 stacks> 'When obtained' Attributes trigger 3 times instead ([Investor] Operators on Bench can also count toward activating this Alliance)

bondInfo.name: Harmony
bondInfo.desc: The [Harmony] Alliance grants +1 Operator count to Core Alliances ([Yan], [Sargon], [Victoria], [Kjerag], [Laterano], and [Ægir]); [Harmony] Operators also gain effects from said activated Alliances

bondInfo.name: Foresight
bondInfo.desc: <For every 10 stacks added> Gain +2 Funds <At 100 stacks (first-time only)> Dispatch Center Operators cost 1 less Funds permanently ([Foresight] Operators on Bench can also count toward activating this Alliance)

bondInfo.name: Precision
bondInfo.desc: High Ground Operators (10 + 1.2 × stacks)% ATK <With 3 different [Precision] Operators on field> High Ground Operators' attacks ignore 30% DEF and RES, and attacks silence targets for 2 seconds

bondInfo.name: Durable
bondInfo.desc: All Operators gain +(30 + 1.25 × stacks)% HP <With 3 different [Durable] Operators on the field> Whenever a non-[Durable] Operator takes damage, 40% of that damage is split among all [Durable] Operators on field

bondInfo.name: Raid
bondInfo.desc: If a [Raid] Operator's skill is ready with no enemies in their attack range, they will redeploy near a ground enemy, use their skill, and gain +(10 + 1 × stacks)% ATK and HP during the skill duration <At 30 stacks> All Operators -50% DP Cost

bondInfo.name: Marvel
bondInfo.desc: On Dispatch Center refresh, there is a (25 + 0.3 × stacks)% chance the next refresh will be free <Every 50 stacks> Gain 10 Funds ([Marvel] Operators on Bench can also count toward activating this Alliance)

bondInfo.name: Resilient
bondInfo.desc: When a Ground Operator is defeated, there is a (18 + 0.4 × stacks)% chance they will immediately redeploy <With 3 different [Resilient] Operators on field> When defeated, Ground Operators grant +5 SP to all Operators on the field

bondInfo.name: Swift
bondInfo.desc: [Swift] Operators have a (20 + 0.35 × stacks)% chance when their skill ends to immediately recover 10 SP <At 40 stacks> All Operators have the same chance to recover 15 SP when their skill ends

bondInfo.name: Aid
bondInfo.desc: All Operators gain +(15 + 1.2 × stacks)% DEF and -30% Redeployment Time When Rest Phase ends, +2 stacks to all active Alliances <With 3 different [Aid] Operators on field> +4 stacks instead

bondInfo.name: Agile
bondInfo.desc: [Agile] Operators and Operators in the 8 adjacent tiles around them gain +(10 + 1 × stacks) ASPD <At 20 stacks> First manual refresh every Rest Phase will lower equipment price to 1 Fund

bondInfo.name: Assist Operator
bondInfo.desc: All Operators take -20% Physical and Arts damage, deal 120% more damage; Elite Operators deal 140% more damage
